title: helichrysum stramineum
intro: Helichrysum stramineum, also known as the yellow or straw crown, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family that is native to southern Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Helichrysum stramineum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, tincture, and essential oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
